then.message: Payment terms exceed standard 15 days, impacting cash flow.
then.recommendation: Negotiate payment terms down to 15-30 days to optimize working capital cycles.
then.rationale: Extended terms delay receivable collections, increasing collection costs and operational risk.

then.message: The agreement specifies late payment interest fees on overdue amounts.
then.recommendation: Confirm that interest rates are capped at commercial norms (e.g. 1% per month) and respect legal limits.
then.rationale: Late payment interest compensates vendors for delayed funds while encouraging client invoicing discipline.

then.message: Client may withhold payment in good faith for disputed invoices.
then.recommendation: Require that client pays undisputed amounts, notifies vendor of dispute details within 10 days, and works to resolve the dispute.
then.rationale: Allowing clients to withhold disputed funds prevents paying for faulty services while safeguarding vendor cash flow on valid deliverables.
